mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT t.* FROM task t INNER JOIN task_tag tt ON t.id = tt.task_id INNER JOIN user_profile up ON up.user_id = #{userId} WHERE t.status = 2 AND tt.tag_id IN ( SELECT id FROM tag WHERE JSON_CONTAINS( (SELECT skill_tags FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId}), CAST(id AS JSON) ) ) AND (up.price_min IS NULL OR t.budget_max >= up.price_min) AND (up.price_max IS NULL OR t.budget_min <= up.price_max) ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
